data.body: src/rebar/llm/plan_review/det_floor.py: P1-P8 implemented, polyglot + fail-open (each check abstains on error, never aborts the floor). P1 readiness-shape (BLOCKS), P2/P3 consume the 8f6c grounding oracle (refute_absence) for file/package resolution (coverage-only, never block), P4 oversize, P5 task-DAG cycle (BLOCKS) + file interference (advisory), P6 AC quality, P7 destructive sniff, P8 reviewability/context-budget (BLOCKS). exec=DET tier dispatched by the orchestrator's code executor. Coverage recorded via det_coverage() onto the attestation. DET floor is the only tier that blocks by default in v1. Unit-tested: tests/unit/test_plan_review.py (P1/P5-cycle/P7/P8 + fail-open + P2/P3-never-block).
